decisions.reasoning: Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom. Even though Rillaboom outspeeds, it cannot OHKO Calyrex-Ice, making this the optimal play to secure an immediate advantage.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Tornadus-Therian. Even though Tornadus outspeeds, Calyrex-Ice survives any of its moves, making this the optimal play to secure the KO.
High Horsepower is a 2HKO and deals significantly more damage than Glacial Lance due to the type advantage, ensuring I secure the KO on Iron Hands before it can drain punch back.

Calyrex-Ice is at 20% HP and will be KO'd by almost any move from Tornadus-Therian. Since Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO, attacking now secures the KO before Calyrex-Ice faints, preventing the opponent from gaining further momentum.
